texts.tea_text: Alishan Jin Xuan tea offers a dramatic inversion: a naturally milky, velvety aroma developed to survive the 1,600m alpine freeze. Crisp at first, comforting to the end.
texts.event_description:
Tea Tasting & Listening Session #001
Friends and Family Tea Party
